title: rotheca quadrangulata
intro: Rotheca quadrangulata, also known as the four-angled Rotheca, is a flowering plant species in the family Acanthaceae. The medicinal properties of Rotheca quadrangulata lie in its leaves, which are traditionally used in folk medicine to treat various ailments. The health benefits of this plant include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and skin infections. In herbal preparations, Rotheca quadrangulata is often used in teas, infusions, and decoctions to harness its medicinal properties, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
